basics.name: Chancellor Edwards
basics.label: Application Developer · Product Manager
basics.summary: Application Developer with experience building open and closed source software systems for public and private sector clients. Strong foundations in hardware, networking, databases, and object-oriented programming.

work.name: Baca Stein White and Associates
work.summary: Develops and maintains an enterprise web portal collecting and storing data inside Microsoft databases. Collaborates with cross-functional teams to refactor code, resolve bugs, and improve performance. Contributes to data engineering operations — retrieving, transforming, and presenting data inside custom reporting dashboards.

work.name: Sanmore Investments LLC
work.summary: Led product strategy and development operations across the full product lifecycle. Orchestrated cloud engineering, application development, and design teams alongside business stakeholders to deliver focused solutions.

work.name: IBM
work.summary: Application Developer serving government and logistics clients. At the U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs (Sep 2022 – May 2024): automated a business-critical process clearing a significant backlog of cases; coordinated development across 4 components of a mission-critical application; led sprint planning, retrospectives, and backlog refinement. At UPS (Aug 2021 – Sep 2022): built and enhanced logistics software systems; led agile ceremonies and coached teams on Scrum best practices.
